name: Wolf
description: Pack intelligence — coordinated pursuit predation where individuals assume specialized roles (driver, flanker, ambusher) through real-time gaze and postural communication. Social hierarchy is dynamic and context-dependent, not rigidly dominance-based. Howl harmonics encode identity, location, and emotional state across distances up to 16 km. Trophic cascade intelligence: wolf presence restructures entire ecosystems (Yellowstone river course alteration).

core_attributes.neurology: highly developed prefrontal cortex, mirror neuron system
core_attributes.pattern: coordinated pursuit, dynamic social hierarchy, acoustic identity encoding, trophic cascade
